message:
feat(cli): add standard progress patterns for long operations (ntm-952.2.4)

Add unified progress messaging system in internal/output/progress.go:

- Steps: Sequential step tracking with Start/Done/Fail/Skip/Warn
- Progress: One-shot messages (Success, Warning, Error, Info)
- Operation: Multi-step operation tracking with error/warning collection

Apply to CLI commands:
- spawn: Use Steps for session creation, pane creation, agent launch
- quick: Replace inline colorize() calls with Progress helpers

Acceptance criteria met:
- Long ops show step-oriented progress
- Failures show which step failed
- No noisy logs by default

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"ntm-952.2.2","title":"CLI: Session inference + interactive chooser when omitted","description":"When the session argument is omitted, infer intelligently (cwd/project) and fall back to an interactive chooser instead of hard-failing.","acceptance_criteria":"- Uses a single, shared session-resolution algorithm across commands\n- If multiple candidates exist, presents a chooser with clear defaults\n- Clearly explains which session was selected and why","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","estimated_minutes":180,"created_at":"2025-12-12T12:36:31.41121191-06:00","updated_at":"2025-12-12T12:36:31.41121191-06:00","labels":["ux","cli"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"ntm-952.2.2","depends_on_id":"ntm-952.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"0001-01-01T00:00:00Z","created_by":""},{"issue_id":"ntm-952.2.2","depends_on_id":"ntm-4ji","type":"blocks","created_at":"0001-01-01T00:00:00Z","created_by":""},{"issue_id":"ntm-952.2.2","depends_on_id":"ntm-bke.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"0001-01-01T00:00:00Z","created_by":""}]}
 {"id":"ntm-952.2.3","title":"CLI: Add 'What next' success footers for major commands","description":"After successful commands like spawn/quick/attach, print a short next-step footer that nudges users into the intended workflow.","acceptance_criteria":"- Success output includes 1-3 next commands (dashboard/palette/send)\n- Messaging is concise and skimmable\n- Can be disabled in robot/terse mode","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"LilacStone","estimated_minutes":90,"created_at":"2025-12-12T12:36:31.507544927-06:00","updated_at":"2025-12-12T13:25:56.505450574-06:00","closed_at":"2025-12-12T13:25:56.505450574-06:00","labels":["ux","cli"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"ntm-952.2.3","depends_on_id":"ntm-952.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"0001-01-01T00:00:00Z","created_by":""}]}

Applied to spawn.go and quick.go commands.","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"Claude","estimated_minutes":120,"created_at":"2025-12-12T12:36:31.556823697-06:00","updated_at":"2025-12-13T02:37:25.648371326-06:00","closed_at":"2025-12-13T02:37:25.648371326-06:00","labels":["ux","cli"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"ntm-952.2.4","depends_on_id":"ntm-952.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"0001-01-01T00:00:00Z","created_by":""}]}
 {"id":"ntm-952.3","title":"SUB-EPIC: Command Palette Premium","description":"Focus: command palette that feels fast, obvious, and delightful.

Deliverables:
- Recents/favorites/pinning
- Crystal-clear target selection (who will receive this?)
- Preview that reduces misfires (metadata, warnings)
- Help overlay and consistent navigation","design":"## Palette = “fast path”
The palette should be the fastest way to:
- pick a vetted prompt
- choose recipients confidently
- send with minimal risk of misfire

## Premium feel comes from
- Recents/favorites (reduces re-searching)
- Clear recipient preview (reduces uncertainty)
- Stable filtering (no jumpy list)
- Help overlay (no docs required)

## Persistence
Prefer using existing config mechanisms (global + project), not inventing new storage.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2025-12-12T12:33:24.793248034-06:00","updated_at":"2025-12-12T12:40:48.893976239-06:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"ntm-952.3","depends_on_id":"ntm-952","type":"parent-child","created_at":"0001-01-01T00:00:00Z","created_by":""}]}
 {"id":"ntm-952.3.1","title":"Palette: Recents, favorites, and pinning","description":"Add recents/favorites/pinning to make the palette feel like a power tool (less re-searching, fewer repeat mistakes).","acceptance_criteria":"- Recents list updates automatically\n- Favorites/pins are persisted\n- Works for both global and project palettes","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","estimated_minutes":180,"created_at":"2025-12-12T12:36:55.066500362-06:00","updated_at":"2025-12-12T12:36:55.066500362-06:00","labels":["ux","tui","palette"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"ntm-952.3.1","depends_on_id":"ntm-952.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"0001-01-01T00:00:00Z","created_by":""},{"issue_id":"ntm-952.3.1","depends_on_id":"ntm-bke.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"0001-01-01T00:00:00Z","created_by":""}]}
 {"id":"ntm-952.3.2","title":"Palette: Target selector clarity (counts + sample panes)","description":"Make the target selector answer “who will receive this?” at a glance: counts, representative pane names, and clear defaults.","acceptance_criteria":"- Target selector shows recipient count\n- Defaults are predictable and visible\n- Works across width tiers without wrapping","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","estimated_minutes":120,"created_at":"2025-12-12T12:36:55.145211478-06:00","updated_at":"2025-12-12T12:36:55.145211478-06:00","labels":["ux","tui","palette"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"ntm-952.3.2","depends_on_id":"ntm-952.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"0001-01-01T00:00:00Z","created_by":""},{"issue_id":"ntm-952.3.2","depends_on_id":"ntm-ci35","type":"blocks","created_at":"0001-01-01T00:00:00Z","created_by":""}]}
 {"id":"ntm-952.3.3","title":"Palette: Search UX polish (highlighting + stable sort)","description":"Improve search feel: highlight match segments, maintain stable ordering, and avoid jumpy list behavior while typing.","acceptance_criteria":"- Match text is highlighted (with fallbacks)\n- Sorting is stable between keystrokes\n- No flicker/jitter when filtering","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"BrownStone","estimated_minutes":120,"created_at":"2025-12-12T12:36:55.222361503-06:00","updated_at":"2025-12-12T13:16:48.053815664-06:00","closed_at":"2025-12-12T13:16:48.053815664-06:00","labels":["ux","tui","palette"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"ntm-952.3.3","depends_on_id":"ntm-952.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"0001-01-01T00:00:00Z","created_by":""}]}

+{"id":"ntm-952.3.4","title":"Palette: Preview metadata + safety nudges + help overlay","description":"Upgrade the preview pane to reduce misfires: show prompt metadata (length/targets), optional warning badges, and a consistent help overlay.","acceptance_criteria":"- Preview shows target summary + prompt metadata\n- Optional lightweight warning badges (non-blocking)\n- Help overlay uses shared component","status":"in_progress","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"BlackCreek","estimated_minutes":150,"created_at":"2025-12-12T12:36:55.275478496-06:00","updated_at":"2025-12-13T02:31:34.15652558-06:00","labels":["ux","tui","palette"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"ntm-952.3.4","depends_on_id":"ntm-952.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"0001-01-01T00:00:00Z","created_by":""},{"issue_id":"ntm-952.3.4","depends_on_id":"ntm-952.1.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"0001-01-01T00:00:00Z","created_by":""}]}
 {"id":"ntm-952.4","title":"SUB-EPIC: Dashboard Premium","description":"Focus: dashboard interactions, information hierarchy, and stability under refresh.

Deliverables:
- Help/legend overlay and consistent keymap
- Better empty/loading/error states with retry affordances
- Reduced layout jitter/flicker
- Quick actions that match the real workflow","design":"## Dashboard success criteria
The dashboard should answer, at a glance:
- what’s running
- what’s broken
- what needs attention now

## Stability matters
A “premium” dashboard does not flicker or jump on refresh. Prioritize:
- stable selection/focus
- stable panel heights
- budgeted refresh/capture

## Help overlay
A lightweight '?' overlay is the single best discoverability upgrade for this surface.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2025-12-12T12:33:24.819145086-06:00","updated_at":"2025-12-12T12:40:48.925212844-06:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"ntm-952.4","depends_on_id":"ntm-952","type":"parent-child","created_at":"0001-01-01T00:00:00Z","created_by":""}]}
 {"id":"ntm-952.4.1","title":"Dashboard: Help/legend overlay + consistent keymap","description":"Add an in-dashboard help/legend overlay (e.g., '?') showing key bindings, icon legend, and navigation model.","acceptance_criteria":"- Help overlay is discoverable and non-intrusive\n- Uses shared HelpOverlay/KeyHint components\n- Keymap matches palette where reasonable","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","estimated_minutes":150,"created_at":"2025-12-12T12:37:22.343221856-06:00","updated_at":"2025-12-12T12:37:22.343221856-06:00","closed_at":"2025-12-13T07:57:11Z","labels":["ux","tui","dashboard"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"ntm-952.4.1","depends_on_id":"ntm-952.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"0001-01-01T00:00:00Z","created_by":""},{"issue_id":"ntm-952.4.1","depends_on_id":"ntm-952.1.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"0001-01-01T00:00:00Z","created_by":""},{"issue_id":"ntm-952.4.1","depends_on_id":"ntm-im5l","type":"blocks","created_at":"0001-01-01T00:00:00Z","created_by":""}]}
 {"id":"ntm-952.4.2","title":"Dashboard: Panel empty/loading/error states + retry","description":"Ensure every dashboard panel has consistent empty/loading/error states with a clear retry/refresh affordance.","acceptance_criteria":"- Panels never render blank/ambiguous states\n- Retry/refresh action exists where applicable\n- Uses shared empty/loading/error components","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"Claude","estimated_minutes":180,"created_at":"2025-12-12T12:37:22.443283929-06:00","updated_at":"2025-12-13T02:04:35.670611636-06:00","closed_at":"2025-12-13T02:04:35.670611636-06:00","labels":["ux","tui","dashboard"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"ntm-952.4.2","depends_on_id":"ntm-952.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"0001-01-01T00:00:00Z","created_by":""},{"issue_id":"ntm-952.4.2","depends_on_id":"ntm-952.1.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"0001-01-01T00:00:00Z","created_by":""},{"issue_id":"ntm-952.4.2","depends_on_id":"ntm-p99w","type":"blocks","created_at":"0001-01-01T00:00:00Z","created_by":""}]}
